description: Create a simulated radiation therapy target volume in InVesalius 3 using the loaded CT Cranium scan. Manually segment a circular target region in the center of the brain on Axial Slices 60, 61, and 62 using a new mask. Generate a 3D surface from this segmentation and export it as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/target_volume.stl. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
